allow:
Bash(powershell -File - <<'PSEOF'
$root = "C:\\Users\\Hunti\\Downloads\\premier-lumber-site"
$files = Get-ChildItem -Path $root\\src,$root\\index.html -Recurse -Include *.tsx,*.ts,*.html
foreach \($f in $files\) {
  $content = Get-Content $f.FullName -Raw
  if \($content -match '938-6275|Atcheson|Gary, IN 46403|Since 1985|40\\+ years|since 1985'\) {
    $content = $content -replace '\\\(219\\\) 938-6275','\(219\) 398-2010'
    $content = $content -replace 'tel:\\+12199386275','tel:+12193982010'
    $content = $content -replace '6717 Atcheson Dr','724 Chicago Ave'
    $content = $content -replace '6717\\+Atcheson\\+Dr','724+Chicago+Ave'
    $content = $content -replace '6717%20Atcheson%20Dr','724+Chicago+Ave'
    $content = $content -replace 'Gary, IN 46403','East Chicago, IN 46312'
    $content = $content -replace 'Gary,\\+IN\\+46403','East+Chicago,+IN+46312'
    $content = $content -replace 'Since 1985','Since 2000'
    $content = $content -replace 'since 1985','since 2000'
    $content = $content -replace '40\\+ years','26+'
    Set-Content $f.FullName -Value $content -NoNewline
    Write-Output "Updated: $\($f.Name\)"
  }
}
PSEOF)
